cleavage agent: bead-bound proteins were digested by the addition of 10 ml trypsin solution 15 ng /ul
enrichment method: modified rapid immunoprecipitation mass spectrometry of endogenous proteins (RIME)
fractionation method: chromatin fractionation followed by Western blotting
instrument: MS was performed using an LTQ Velos-Orbitrap MS
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ion mode
labeling: the cells were labelled using stable isotope labelling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
